---
title: "Cho Data Team"
---

## Methodology reflection

TODO: semi-structured design, saturation notes

## Codebook

TODO: themes, subthemes, confidence levels

## Next research questions

TODO:

- Ẩm thực hypothesis (chưa được probe đủ trong study này)
- Foreign Visitors / Vietnamese Studies hypothesis
- Follow-up survey design cho post-pilot

## Data gaps

TODO
